misconfig_patterns: No authentication mechanism exists in open-source version
HTTP API at :9308 and MySQL wire at :9306 both fully open by default
SHOW TABLES enumerates all indexes without credentials

active_probe.false_positive_check: X-Powered-By header must equal Manticore Search

deployment_tells: X-Powered-By: Manticore Search header on all :9308 responses
MySQL wire protocol at :9306 — connect with mysql client, no password
POST /sql with SHOW TABLES enumerates all indexes
pivot_paths: POST /sql body=SHOW+TABLES → index list without auth
POST /sql body=DESCRIBE+{table} → schema including vector columns
